description: §41.14.5 — omit=["agree"] names ONLY a valid Signup field. Near-miss sibling of formfor-omit-invalid-field: proves E-FORMFOR-OMIT-INVALID-FIELD is gated on unknown field names specifically, not on the mere presence of omit=.
rationale: §41.14.5: omit=[...] SHALL accept an array literal of bare field-name strings that are all declared struct fields; a fully-valid omit list does NOT fire E-FORMFOR-OMIT-INVALID-FIELD.
